name_en: 🆕 M60574 Vanilla Purple! This zippered coin wallet is the ideal choice for city dwellers. Compact and exquisite, it is perfect for holding coins, credit cards, and folded bills. It can be easily slipped into even small pockets. 11 x 8 x 1 cm
